title: piper frustratum
intro: Piper frustratum, also known as the 'Frustrated Pepper', is a plant species within the Piperaceae family, characterized by its small, greenish-white flowers and fragrant berries. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Piper frustratum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations often involve the plant's berries, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
